item.title: ABB India Ltd’s Mixed Week: -0.14% Price Change Amid Technical Shifts and Sector Volatility
item.description: ABB India Ltd closed the week ending 6 March 2026 with a marginal decline of 0.14%, settling at Rs.6,065.90, while the Sensex fell sharply by 3.00%. The stock demonstrated resilience amid a volatile market backdrop, marked by technical momentum shifts and sector-specific pressures. Despite early-week losses, ABB India staged a late recovery, outperforming the broader index and its sector on key trading days. Time: Mar 07 2026 02:07 PM IST

item.title: Greenlam Industries Declines 1.99% Amid Bearish Technicals and Downgrade
item.description: Greenlam Industries Ltd closed the week at Rs.234.05, down 1.99% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.238.80, while the Sensex declined 3.00% over the same period. Despite the broader market weakness, Greenlam outperformed the benchmark by 1.01 percentage points. The week was marked by a series of bearish technical developments, a downgrade to a Strong Sell rating, and persistent negative momentum, all contributing to the stock’s subdued performance. Time: Mar 07 2026 02:07 PM IST

item.title: RIR Power Electronics Ltd Declines 0.92% Amid Volatile Week and Market Pressure
item.description: RIR Power Electronics Ltd closed the week ending 6 March 2026 at Rs.172.60, down 0.92% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.174.20. This modest decline came amid a turbulent week marked by sharp intraday volatility and a significant gap down on 2 March. Despite the stock’s slight fall, it outperformed the broader Sensex, which declined 3.00% over the same period, reflecting relative resilience in a challenging market environment. Time: Mar 07 2026 02:07 PM IST

item.title: Cholamandalam Investment Falls 6.08%: Technical Shift and Valuation Concerns Shape Week
item.description: Cholamandalam Investment & Finance Company Ltd experienced a challenging week ending 6 March 2026, with its share price declining 6.08% to close at Rs.1,625.50, underperforming the Sensex which fell 3.00% over the same period. The week was marked by significant intraday volatility, a downgrade in investment rating from Buy to Hold, and a notable shift in technical momentum from mildly bullish to sideways, reflecting growing caution among investors amid elevated valuation concerns and broader market pressures. Time: Mar 07 2026 02:07 PM IST

item.title: Ashok Leyland Ltd. Falls 7.84%: 2 Key Factors Behind the Weekly Decline
item.description: Ashok Leyland Ltd. experienced a challenging week from 2 to 6 March 2026, with its stock price declining by 7.84% to close at Rs.194.55, underperforming the Sensex which fell 3.00% over the same period. The week was marked by significant intraday lows, heightened derivatives activity, and sectoral pressures that weighed on the stock’s performance despite its longer-term resilience. Time: Mar 07 2026 02:07 PM IST

item.title: Rane Holdings Ltd Gains 2.60%: Volatility and Technical Signals Shape the Week
item.description: Rane Holdings Ltd closed the week with a modest gain of 2.60%, outperforming the Sensex which declined 3.00% over the same period. The stock experienced significant volatility, marked by a sharp gap down at the start of the week amid market concerns, followed by a strong gap up midweek reflecting renewed positive sentiment. Despite these swings, technical indicators and a recent downgrade to a Strong Sell rating continue to weigh on the stock’s outlook. Time: Mar 07 2026 02:07 PM IST

item.title: RattanIndia Power Ltd Drops 3.74%: 4 Key Factors Behind the Slide
item.description: RattanIndia Power Ltd’s shares declined by 3.74% over the week ending 6 March 2026, closing at Rs.7.98 compared to Rs.8.29 the previous Friday. This underperformance slightly exceeded the Sensex’s 3.00% fall during the same period, reflecting persistent challenges amid weak financials, high leverage, and technical bearishness. The stock hit fresh 52-week lows twice this week, underscoring ongoing downward momentum despite intermittent intraday recoveries. Time: Mar 07 2026 02:07 PM IST
